creator: phoemix@harmless.hu
text:
/usr/ports/net-im/licq-console# make install clean

after installing:
$ licq -p console
14:14:32: [ERR] Unable to load plugin (console): /usr/local/lib/licq/licq_console.so: Undefined symbol "_ZN10CICQDaemon21icqFileTransferRefuseEmPKctPmb".
14:14:32: [WRN] This usually happens when your plugin
      is not kept in sync with the daemon.
      Please try recompiling the plugin.
      If you are still having problems, see
      the FAQ at www.licq.org

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: see description
